key.name: toggle-dictation
key.description: Shortcut that toggles regular Voxtype push-to-talk dictation.

key.name: cancel-dictation
key.description: Shortcut that cancels the current Voxtype recording or transcription.

key.name: toggle-meeting
key.description: Shortcut that starts or stops Voxtype meeting mode.

key.name: pause-resume-meeting
key.summary: Pause or resume Voxtype meeting mode
key.description: Shortcut that pauses or resumes the current Voxtype meeting.

key.name: monitor
key.description: Which monitor to show the OSD on. "primary" uses the primary monitor, "active" uses the monitor with the current keyboard focus.
